title: Lesson 191: (Grammar) - the expectation is that ...; the reason is that .....

intro_cards.title: Casual Explanation: んです
intro_cards.body:
んです is the contracted form of のです — very common in natural speech.

• 疲れたんですか？(Are you tired? — asking with concern)
• 実は、もう帰るんです。(Actually, I'm leaving now — explaining)
• どこに行くんですか？(Where are you going? — curious)

んです vs ます/です:
• ます/です: neutral statement of fact
• んです: explanation, seeking/giving context, softened question

んだ (plain form) = very casual:
• これ、おいしいんだよ。(This is really delicious, you know.)

Hearing んです? Someone is explaining. Using んですか? You're asking for an explanation.
